summary.weather: Seoul (Monday, March 30, 2026: Clear skies, stable temperatures for start of trading week).
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 30, 12:40 AM): Geopolitical tension in the Middle East continues to impact oil futures. Asian markets show early resilience, focusing on semiconductor stability (NVDA/TSM) and energy supply chain risk management.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 30, 12:40 AM): Continued growth in digital-physical hybrid works and high-end asset diversification ahead of spring auctions.
